recommendations.title: Under the Sun of Satan
recommendations.overview: Satan tempts Father Dossignan, who is trying to save the soul of a young girl who killed one of her lovers.

recommendations.title: Loulou
recommendations.overview: A bored wife leaves her husband for an unemployed, petty criminal.

recommendations.title: A Nos Amours

recommendations.title: Van Gogh

recommendations.title: Street Flow
recommendations.overview: Noumouké, from the suburb of Paris, is about to decide which brother's foot steps to follow - the lawyer student Soulaymaan or the gangster Demba.

recommendations.title: Jolly LLB 2
recommendations.overview: A blunt, abrasive and yet oddly compassionate Jagdishwar Mishra aka Jolly, a small-time struggling lawyer who moves from Kanpur to the city of Nawabs to pursue his dream of becoming a big-time lawyer.

recommendations.title: Where the Sidewalk Ends
recommendations.overview: A police detective's violent nature keeps him from being a good cop.

recommendations.title: The Loner

recommendations.title: Simple Simon
recommendations.overview: Simon has Asperger's syndrome and doesn't like changes in his life. He lives with his big brother Sam and Sam's girlfriend Frida. When Frida can't stand having to adapt to Simon's peculiarities anymore she takes off, leaving Simon with having to find

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.
